actions.name: 未命名事件
actions.caption: 未命名事件
actions.expression:
SELECT cymx.sid,cymx.khmc,cymx.yjje 
FROM cymx 
WHERE (cymx.fphm=[佣金管理.外销发票]) 
  AND permission('出运明细') 
ORDER BY cymx.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.name: 未命名事件428
actions.caption: 未命名事件428
actions.expression:
SELECT yhhlsheet.sid,yhhlsheet.yhhl 
FROM yhhl,yhhlsheet 
WHERE (yhhl.sid=yhhlsheet.pid) 
  AND (yhhlsheet.hbdm=[佣金管理.货币代码]) 
  AND (yhhlsheet.hlrq=[佣金管理.付款日期]) 
ORDER BY yhhlsheet.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.name: 计算-付款金额
actions.caption: 计算-付款金额
actions.expression: [佣金管理.付款外汇]*[佣金管理.银行汇率]

view.params:
SELECT hbdm.hbdm,hbdm.SID
FROM hbdm
ORDER BY hbdm.SID ASC

SELECT kh.company_name,kh.SID
FROM kh
WHERE   permission('客户资料')
ORDER BY kh.SID ASC

SELECT yhhlsheet.yhhl,yhhlsheet.SID
FROM yhhl,yhhlsheet
WHERE   (yhhl.rid=yhhlsheet.PID)
   AND  (yhhlsheet.hbdm=[佣金管理.货币代码])
   AND  (yhhlsheet.hlrq=[佣金管理.付款日期])
ORDER BY yhhlsheet.SID ASC

SELECT wbyhzl.zwmc,wbyhzl.SID
FROM wbyhzl
ORDER BY wbyhzl.SID ASC
